title: Of Scales and Claws
description: Fantasy combat and exploration - with a bit of magic. Featuring "Ice and Fire", "Ars Nouveau" and more!
body:
# Intro
Focus on "**Ice and Fire**", "**Ars Nouveau**" and "**Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks**". Enhanced world generation, caves and mobs. Shader support through "**Oculus**". Leaning towards exploration and combat. Multiplayer friendly!

# Features
### Pick Your Playstyle
Be a **Demon Witch** summoning useful deities from the demon realm with **Occultism**! Or a **Battle Mage** casting powerfull spells from **Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks**! Or just rip your enemies apart with brute **Berserker** force powered **Simply Swords**! Or create your **own  spells** dwelling into the deep complexities of **Ars Nouveau**! Or just be everything like the op superplayer that you are!

### Powerful Foes
There are **Dragons**. There are evil **Illagers**. There are horrible **Deep Sea Monsters**. There are backstabbing **Acrolytes**. There are hungry **Undead**. There is plenty to kill and be killed by!

### Less Grind, More Action
The world is in trouble! There is no time for complex mining. This modpack enables you to set up ore generation quickly by finding Geodes for most ores! Need a steady supply of diamonds? Find a Diamond Geode and get crackin'!

# Precautions
This modpack includes "**Distant Horizonz**"(DH) to render that beautiful landscape of yours. Be advised, that this needs a bit of CPU power to cache and render chunks. So for every chunk you explore it will also make a smaller (LOD) copy. This might impact performance.

Also included is our favourite shader: "**Complementary**".

**Both eye-candy additions are DISABLED by default, because I don't want to burn potatoes.**

This modpack is still in testing. We are playing it to improve compability between mods. You feedback is welcome.
